category_sources: source_facts.description says tools to manipulate dates with a focus on financial data.
source_facts.executables lists date manipulation commands such as dateadd, datediff, dateconv, dateseq, and datezone.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage https://www.fresse.org/dateutils.
source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository; README is the best source-control documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository value https://github.com/hroptatyr/dateutils; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description notes date manipulation focused on financial data.
source_facts.executables lists many date/time command-line tools.
